title: Retro Racer
description: Speed through neon-lit streets in this high-octane 8-bit racing simulator. Avoid obstacles and reach the finish line.

title: Neon Jump
description: A gravity-defying platformer where you must jump between floating neon platforms without falling into the void.

title: Block Breaker
description: Classic arcade action! Use your paddle to bounce the ball and destroy all the colored blocks on the screen.

title: Cosmic Cube
description: Navigate a glowing cube through a series of increasingly difficult geometric mazes in deep space.

title: Pixel Paladin
description: Protect the kingdom from waves of pixelated enemies using your trusty sword and magical abilities.

title: Gravity Glide
description: A relaxing yet challenging experience where you control a paper plane gliding through beautiful landscapes.
